x-enumeration-literals.name: Market Expansion
x-enumeration-literals.description: Entering new geographic markets or targeting new customer segments to increase market share.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Diversification
x-enumeration-literals.description: Expanding the company's product or service offerings to reduce risk and tap into new revenue streams.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Mergers and Acquisitions
x-enumeration-literals.description: -    Acquiring or merging with other companies to achieve strategic growth or synergy.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Process Improvement
x-enumeration-literals.description: Enhancing efficiency and productivity by streamlining processes, adopting best practices, or implementing new technologies

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cost Reduction
x-enumeration-literals.description: Identifying and eliminating unnecessary expenses to improve profitability.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Quality Management
x-enumeration-literals.description: Implementing quality control systems and continuous improvement practices to enhance product or service quality.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Revenue Growth
x-enumeration-literals.description: Strategies focused on increasing sales and revenue, such as launching new products, enhancing sales techniques, or expanding marketing efforts

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cost Management
x-enumeration-literals.description: -    Initiatives aimed at controlling and reducing costs to improve financial health.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Capital Optimization
x-enumeration-literals.description: Improving the use of capital through better investment decisions, asset management, or debt restructuring

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Experience Improvement
x-enumeration-literals.description: Enhancing customer satisfaction and loyalty by improving customer service, user experience, or product quality

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Retention
x-enumeration-literals.description: Implementing programs and strategies to retain existing customers, such as loyalty programs, personalized marketing, or improved customer support

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Acquisition
x-enumeration-literals.description: Strategies to attract new customers, including marketing campaigns, promotional offers, and strategic partnerships

x-enumeration-literals.name: Regulatory Compliance
x-enumeration-literals.description: -    Ensuring that the company adheres to all relevant laws, regulations, and industry standards.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Risk Management
x-enumeration-literals.description: Identifying, assessing, and mitigating risks that could impact the business, including financial, operational, and strategic risks
